course_title: Building Community Supports for Persons with Disabilities
description:
Offered: annually
The purpose of this course is to introduce students to issues, policies, laws and emerging practices regarding educational and community services for persons with disabilities and other marginalized groups. Social Role Valorization, Person Centered Planning, Self-determination and competency based assessment will be features. A forty-five hour field practicum is a required component of this course.
Prerequisite(s): HMSV 1100
